description: Case style: Digital watch with plastic round case, embedded, fixed steel bezelDial style: Dial separated into three parts - one for time display, one for date display and one circle for stop clock timing (dual time display)Features: Four buttons to reset time and other features - Mode selection button, time keeping button, alarm setting button, stopwatch button Strap style: Black plastic strap with a tang claspWater resistant 10 BAR Warranty: 1 yearPlease refer to the instruction manual for details regarding usage and care
